rules.description: Agent must not threaten arrest or police action
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No threat of criminal action when matter is civil
rules.suggested_rewrite: We may need to escalate this account for further review if payment is not received.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten false legal action
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No misrepresentation of legal consequences
rules.suggested_rewrite: If needed, we may seek resolution through appropriate legal channels. Let's discuss options first.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten physical harm or intimidation
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No intimidation or physical threats
rules.suggested_rewrite: We'd like to discuss your account status. Could you visit our branch or schedule a call?

rules.description: Agent must not threaten credit score damage falsely
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No false misrepresentation of consequences
rules.suggested_rewrite: Non-payment may affect your credit history. We can help prevent that by setting up a repayment plan.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten salary garnishment without court order
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(c) - No contacting employer without legal basis
rules.suggested_rewrite: Let's work together on a payment schedule that fits your salary cycle.

rules.description: Agent must not make calls outside permitted hours (8 AM to 7 PM)
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(d) - Contact only between 8 AM and 7 PM
rules.suggested_rewrite: We will contact you during business hours (8 AM to 7 PM) at a convenient time.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten to contact borrower's family or relatives
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(c) - No disclosure to third parties
rules.suggested_rewrite: This matter is confidential between you and us. Let's resolve it directly.

rules.description: Agent must not use public shaming tactics
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(c) - No public disclosure of borrower details
rules.suggested_rewrite: Your account details are strictly confidential. We only discuss them with you directly.

rules.description: Agent must not make excessive or repeated threats of contact
patterns: jab tak pay nahi karoge call aayegi
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(d) - No excessive communication
rules.suggested_rewrite: We'll follow up periodically. Please let us know a good time to discuss your repayment options.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten to visit workplace
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(c) - No visiting workplace for recovery
rules.suggested_rewrite: We can arrange a meeting at our branch office or over a phone call at your convenience.

rules.description: Agent must not use profanity or abusive language
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No use of abusive or aggressive language
rules.suggested_rewrite: We'd like to help find a solution that works for you. Can we discuss your situation?

rules.description: Agent must not use caste-based, religious, or discriminatory slurs
patterns: tum logon ka kaam hi yahi hai
tumhare jaison se yahi umeed thi
aise logon ko loan dena galti thi
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No discriminatory language
rules.suggested_rewrite: Every customer's situation is unique. Let's work out a plan that addresses your specific circumstances.

rules.description: Agent must not use demeaning or belittling language
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No intimidation via language
rules.suggested_rewrite: We believe you can resolve this. Let's explore flexible repayment options together.

rules.description: Agent must not use sarcastic or mocking tone
patterns: loan lena aata hai pay karna nahi
lene ke time toh bade the
when you took the loan you were very eager
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No demeaning or sarcastic communication
rules.suggested_rewrite: We understand situations change. Let's discuss what's possible for you right now.

rules.description: Agent must not use gender-based or sexually harassing language
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No gender-based harassment
rules.suggested_rewrite: You are the account holder, and we'd like to work directly with you on a resolution.

rules.description: Agent must not demand immediate payment under duress
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No coercion for immediate payment
rules.suggested_rewrite: We'd like to settle this at your earliest convenience. Can we set up a payment date that works for you?

rules.description: Agent must not pressure borrower to take new loan to repay
patterns: kisi se udhar leke pay karo
kisi se mango aur pay karo
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No pressure to borrow from other sources
rules.suggested_rewrite: Let's explore restructuring options or an EMI plan that fits your current income.

rules.description: Agent must not use emotional manipulation
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(a) - No emotional manipulation tactics
rules.suggested_rewrite: We understand this is a difficult time. Let's find a workable solution together.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten service discontinuation without legal basis
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No unauthorized service threats
rules.suggested_rewrite: Your banking services are separate from this loan account. Let's discuss the loan repayment specifically.

rules.description: Agent must not threaten property seizure without legal process
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No unauthorized asset seizure threats
rules.suggested_rewrite: If you're facing difficulty, we can discuss restructuring options before any further steps are considered.

rules.description: Agent must not misrepresent the amount owed
rules.rbi_reference: Section 2(a) - No misrepresentation of loan terms
rules.suggested_rewrite: Your current outstanding amount is as per your loan agreement. We can share a detailed statement for your review.

rules.description: Agent must not present fake court orders or legal documents
patterns: warrant aaya hai tumhare naam ka
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No false representation of legal documents
rules.suggested_rewrite: If any legal communications are sent, they will come through official and verifiable channels.

rules.description: Agent must not falsely claim to be law enforcement or government
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No impersonation of government authority
rules.suggested_rewrite: I am calling from [Company Name] regarding your loan account. Let me verify my identity and your account details.

rules.description: Agent must not create false urgency with fabricated deadlines
patterns: aaj raat tak nahi kiya toh
today is the absolute last day
after today nothing can be done
aaj ke baad kuch nahi ho sakta
rules.rbi_reference: Section 3(b) - No fabrication of deadlines or urgency
rules.suggested_rewrite: We'd like to resolve this soon. Let's set a realistic timeline that works for both of us.

rules.description: Agent must not falsely claim loan cannot be restructured
rules.rbi_reference: Section 2(b) - Borrower has right to request restructuring
rules.suggested_rewrite: Let me check what restructuring options might be available for your account. Several plans may still be possible.
